title: Vulkan Chapter Of Potato PVP
description: Its the potato pvp modpack, but instead of sodium optimization mods, vulkan :D
body:
A lightweight(ish) PvP-focused modpack engineered for maximum performance on low-end setups—even laptops powered by hope. Packed with essential combat mods, Vulkan-based optimization, and PvP clarity enhancements, this is your all-in-one competitive stack.

Tested against Lunar, Fabulously Optimized, Simply Optimized, and Feather— Potato PvP Vulkan consistently pulled higher FPS across the board. Even my toaster noticed the difference :D

Performance Mods (For FPS)
- VulkanMod, ModernFix, FerriteCore, Lithium, BadOptimizations, ThreadTweak, FastQuit, MemoryLeakFix, MoreCulling, EntityCulling, Krypton, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME), Very Many Players (VMP), Dynamic FPS, Enhanced Block Entities, Chunky, Video Tape,  Noisium, Noxesium.

Network & Input Tweaks
- Fast IP Ping, Packet Fixer, Mouse Tweaks, Controlling, Forge Config API Port

Quality-of-Life & UI Mods
- Mod Menu, Custom FOV, Searchables, Join AutoSprint, FPS Display, Zoomify, Ok Zoomer

Combat HUDs & PvP Essentials
- TierTagger, PotionCounter, TotemCounter, Uku’s Armor HUD, Totem Tweaks, Marlow’s Crystal Optimizer, AppleSkin, Shield Statuses, HitColor, Effect Timer Plus, TipTapShow.

Texture/Resource Packs-
- No Explosion Particles, No Explosion Sounds, Purplefault.

Libraries & Config APIs
- Cloth Config API, YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL), Fabric API, Fabric Language Kotlin, ukulib.

Sodium Edition Available: [Click here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/potato-pvp)
